titleEn: Bloomin’ Easy Releases 11 New Perennials and Shrubs for 2027
contentHtml:
Bloomin’ Easy is adding 11 new perennials and shrubs (nine of which are exclusive) to its 2027 plant varieties collection.
The post Bloomin’ Easy Releases 11 New Perennials and Shrubs for 2027 appeared first on Greenhouse Grower.
